data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision processes by reducing choices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design layout enhances ease of navigation.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits information chunks for better user comprehension.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Implements familiar design patterns to improve usability.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An appealing interface facilitates a better user experience.
